analysis.object: T752: Berkovich-Artin Descent — Atomic Decomposition depth analysis

step1_tropical_cycle.description: Have: tropical algebraic cycle C_trop in trop(X)

step2_berkovich_lift.description: Lift C_trop to a Berkovich analytic cycle C_an in X^{an}

step3_gaga_algebraize.description: Algebraize C_an to a classical algebraic cycle C_alg in X

step2_depth.description: Step 2 (tropical -> Berkovich): EML-0 -> EML-3 is a TYPE3 upward jump

step3_depth.description: Step 3 (Berkovich -> algebraic): EML-3 -> EML-0 is TYPE3 downward -- the hard step

artin_role.description: Artin approximation: formal (EML-2) solutions approximate algebraic (EML-0)

sole_gap.description: The sole gap: does Berkovich analytic cycle algebraize? EML-3 -> EML-0 crossing
sole_gap.reason: T752: gap is STEP 3 only. Steps 1-2 are EML-3 and proved.
